creator: berend@pobox.com
text:
make fails. Seems unknown option passed to ltconfig, i.e. the --build="${build}" seems to be wrong.

Fix: 

I fixed this by patching the configure script and removing the offending lines. Configure goes somewhat further, but there's another error, also command-line related which I also fixed by removing the offending option.

It finally builds, but install fails with another error, something to do with Perl if I'm correct. I try to update my perl libs, perhaps helps.
How-To-Repeat: Just compile.
